parsed.production_notes: The main scenes with human actors are clearly human-recorded. However, the AI avatar (Character C) appearing in split-screen and phone screen segments exhibits characteristics typical of AI-generated video, such as unnaturally smooth skin, subtle repetitive facial movements, and a somewhat generic, blurred background.

characters.appearance: A young adult male, likely in his early 20s, with a slim build and medium brown complexion. He has short, dark, curly hair, a neatly trimmed beard, and wears clear-framed glasses. His facial features are expressive and earnest.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue short-sleeved t-shirt, dark blue or black pants, and a light blue open-face helmet. He also wears a small microphone clipped to his shirt.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears a bit reserved or focused on his phone, then becomes more confident and enthusiastic when explaining his English learning experience.

characters.appearance: A young adult female, likely in her late 20s or early 30s, with a slim build and medium brown complexion. She has dark hair pulled back into a ponytail or bun, and no glasses. Her facial features are sharp and she has a serious expression at first.
characters.wardrobe: A black collared button-up shirt with short sleeves and black wide-leg pants with a white stripe running down the side. She carries a light green smartphone.
characters.demeanor: Starts off frustrated and stressed, then becomes curious, surprised, and finally impressed and eager to learn.

characters.appearance: A young adult female with a fair complexion and dark, straight hair styled neatly. She has a professional and friendly appearance, with a gentle smile and calm eyes. Her features are very smooth and symmetrical.
characters.wardrobe: A light blue collared shirt under a dark navy blue blazer.
characters.demeanor: Consistently maintains a pleasant, encouraging, and professional expression, typical of an AI avatar designed to be approachable.

scenes.setting: An outdoor pathway next to a modern, light-colored building with red pipes visible on the wall. Green bushes line the path. Daytime, bright natural light.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a young man wearing a light blue helmet and t-shirt, sits on a maroon scooter, holding a black smartphone in his right hand and looking at it. Character B, a young woman in a black shirt and black pants, stands to his right, holding a light green smartphone to her ear with her left hand, looking distressed. They are on an outdoor pathway next to a modern building with green bushes. The lighting is bright and natural.

scenes.visual_description: Character A sits on a maroon scooter, looking at his phone. Character B stands next to him, talking on her phone with a frustrated expression. The background is an outdoor pathway next to a modern building with green bushes. On-screen text overlays appear, describing her interview experience.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character B says: 4th interview ittu. HR heludru English weak ide. Modlu English kali illa job sigalla anta heludru. [It was my 4th interview. HR said my English is weak. They said I won't get a job if I don't learn English first.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
4th interview ittu [It was my 4th interview]
HR heludru [HR said]
modlu English kali illa [first learn English]
job sigalla anta heludru. [you won't get a job.]

scenes.visual_description: Character A on his scooter explains to Character B how he learned English from an AI teacher, gesturing to his chest. Character B listens intently, looking surprised. The background is the same outdoor setting. On-screen text overlays show their Kannada conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Neenu yarinda English kalitiddira? [Who did you learn English from?]
Character A says: Madam SpeakX na AI English teacher inda. Nanu actually kelsa kalkombekaytu adre ee teacher save madidru. [Madam, from SpeakX's AI English teacher. I actually almost lost my job, but this teacher saved me.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
English kalitiddira? [Are you learning English?]
Madam SpeakX na [Madam, SpeakX's]
AI English teacher inda [AI English teacher]
nanu actually [I actually]
kelsa kalkombekaytu [almost lost my job]
adre ee teacher [but this teacher]
save madidru. [saved me.]

scenes.setting: An outdoor pathway next to a modern, light-colored building with red pipes visible on the wall. Green bushes line the path. Daytime, bright natural light.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a young man wearing a light blue helmet and t-shirt, sits on a maroon scooter, looking at Character B with a friendly smile. Character B, a young woman in a black shirt and black pants, stands to his right, holding a light green smartphone in her left hand, looking at Character A with an excited and impressed expression. scenes.visual_description: Character B, now very impressed, asks about the cost. Character A, smiling, explains the affordable trial offer. Character B then asks him to download the app on her phone. The background is the same outdoor setting. On-screen text overlays show their Kannada conversation.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Houda, esht dud agutte? [Really, how much does it cost?]
Character A says: Madam just eradu roopayige elu dina trial ide. [Madam, for just two rupees, there's a seven-day trial.]
Character B says: Houda, ashtena anna? Thank you. Nan phone allu app download madkodi please. [Really, that's all, brother? Thank you. Please download the app on my phone too.]

Houda, [Really,]
esht dud agutte? [how much does it cost?]

thank you
